healthNote.kind: Personal visit notes, not a medical record

discussed.item: Conservative management ongoing; cortisone consult with Dr. Liu still on the table for year-end.
About 2 to 3 per month, weather and stress driven; magnesium plus sumatriptan working. Keeping the diary.
Yoga twice a week, daily walk.

followUps.item: Routine bloodwork ordered, results to the patient portal.
Dental cleaning due (6-month), book at Ridgewood; last was earlier in the year.
Revisit wrists at the next appointment depending on PT progress.

healthNote.summary: Steady. The thing to actually watch is the wrists for career longevity.
